frontier_observations.observation: Incomplete-node exploration produced strong yield and likely benefited from richer host/service context.
untested_edge produced 100% apparent yield across 1469 observed follow-ups.
inferred_edge produced 95% apparent yield across 19 observed follow-ups.

context_gaps.gap: 5 live host nodes still lack operating-system enrichment.
context_gaps.recommendation: Improve parser or manual enrichment coverage so hosts carry OS context before follow-on reasoning.

context_gaps.gap: Techniques were attempted without matching skill coverage: netexec.
context_gaps.recommendation: Add or improve skills for the techniques repeatedly attempted during the engagement.

context_gaps.gap: 6 history entries indicate failures or access denial, which may mean validation warnings were too weak or too generic.
context_gaps.recommendation: Strengthen validate_action guidance for recurring failure patterns so Claude gets clearer pre-execution context.

context_gaps.gap: Structured activity logging is not strong enough to support high-confidence iterative improvements.
context_gaps.recommendation: Prioritize instrumentation: record action_id, event_type, frontier_type, and explicit result linkage for key actions before relying heavily on retrospective guidance.
Improve inference rules or enrich supporting node context so hypotheses arrive with better evidence.

issues: Only 0% of history entries include a frontier type.
